violations.text: Utensils and scouring pad were observed in the hand-washing sink in the kitchen and basement food prep areas. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025
The hand-washing sink in the basement food prep area was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025

Raw animal foods (such as hamburgers) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as cheese) in the refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025

Knives observed stored on an unclean surface (crack between wrap unit and pizza display unit) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of baking sheets on the clean storage rack have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris (scouring pad wire). Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of some food containers have an accumulation of paper and adhesive. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025

Pooled water (rainwater per PIC) observed on the floor along a wall in the basement food prep area. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025
The fan soffit has an accumulation of soil residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2025

The presence of insects is not controlled as evidenced by live small flies in establishment. Encon PCS. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024
Numerous plastic food containers observed not in good repair, cracked with edges broken off. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the chest freezers have an accumulation of frost and debris. The rolling rack in front area has an accumulation of food debris, and dirty tape. A portable fan in the kitchen has an accumulation of dust and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024
One light bulb is missing beneath the hood in the kitchen. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2024
